content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s iterative unsupervised improvement framework as a base structure that can be augmented with the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from modern LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a multi-perspective self-refine system that outperforms both single-perspective Self-Refine and standalone reflection methods. This hybrid system would leverage the no-training, no-supervision advantage of Self-Refine while solving its key limitation of getting stuck in local optimization loops caused by consistent single-perspective feedback.
